The '''Spider People''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. They were most likely related to the [[Cave spider]]s that were still extant in more modern times. This species was quick to jump to conclusions. After losing to the [[X'Ting]] in a war, the Spider People were driven underground from the planet's surface into the underground caves of Ord Cestus.

{{Species-stub}}
